ddls:
CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "func_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "func_name" TEXT /* Name of the computational function */,
  "func_description" TEXT /* Description of the function */,
  "func_version" TEXT /* Version of the function */,
  "func_language" TEXT /* Programming language used for the function */,
  "func_complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the function (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "func_author" TEXT /* Author or creator of the function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("func_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "function_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the function type (e.g., vector, matrix) */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the function type */,
  "type_complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the function type (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., float, double) */,
  "data_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "data_type_precision" TEXT /* Precision of the data type (e.g., single, double) */,
  "data_type_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data type in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "func_id" INTEGER /* ID of the computational function */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function type */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the problem (e.g., number of elements) */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time in seconds */,
  "performance_gflops" REAL /* Performance in gigaflops (GFLOPS) */,
  "memory_bandwidth" REAL /* Memory bandwidth in gigabytes per second (GB/s) */,
  "cpu_utilization" REAL /* CPU utilization during the task */,
  "gpu_utilization" REAL /* GPU utilization during the task */,
  "memory_utilization" REAL /* Memory utilization during the task */,
  "disk_io" REAL /* Disk I/O operations during the task */,
  "network_io" REAL /* Network I/O operations during the task */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Error rate during the task */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the computational node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES computational_nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES function_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_func_id FOREIGN KEY ("func_id") REFERENCES functions ("func_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "computational_nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each computational node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the computational node */,
  "node_description" TEXT /* Description of the computational node */,
  "hardware_config" TEXT /* Hardware configuration of the node */,
  "software_config" TEXT /* Software configuration of the node */,
  "node_status" TEXT /* Current status of the node (e.g., online, offline, maintenance) */,
  "node_location" TEXT /* Physical location of the node */,
  "node_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the node */,
  "node_os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "node_compiler_version" TEXT /* Version of the compiler */,
  "node_last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update of the node's configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_runs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job run */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the computational node */,
  "job_name" TEXT /* Name of the job */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the job */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the job */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "job_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the job */,
  "job_queue_time" REAL /* Time the job spent in the queue before execution */,
  "job_execution_node" TEXT /* Name of the node where the job was executed */,
  "job_output_path" TEXT /* Path to the job's output files */,
  "job_input_path" TEXT /* Path to the job's input files */,
  "job_owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_runs_job_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_runs_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES computational_nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_metrics" (
  "job_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job metric */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job run */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time in seconds */,
  "performance_gflops" REAL /* Performance in gigaflops (GFLOPS) */,
  "memory_bandwidth" REAL /* Memory bandwidth in gigabytes per second (GB/s) */,
  "job_memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the job */,
  "job_cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage of the job */,
  "job_gpu_usage" REAL /* GPU usage of the job */,
  "job_disk_io" REAL /* Disk I/O operations of the job */,
  "job_network_io" REAL /* Network I/O operations of the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_metrics_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_runs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "user_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimization_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization task */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the optimization task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the optimization task */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the task */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "task_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the optimization task */,
  "task_estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated completion date of the task */,
  "task_actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual completion date of the task */,
  "task_resources_allocated" TEXT /* Resources allocated for the task (e.g., number of nodes, memory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_tasks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_metrics" (
  "task_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task metric */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization task */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time in seconds */,
  "performance_gflops" REAL /* Performance in gigaflops (GFLOPS) */,
  "memory_bandwidth" REAL /* Memory bandwidth in gigabytes per second (GB/s) */,
  "task_cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage of the task */,
  "task_gpu_usage" REAL /* GPU usage of the task */,
  "task_memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the task */,
  "task_disk_io" REAL /* Disk I/O operations of the task */,
  "task_network_io" REAL /* Network I/O operations of the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_metrics_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES optimization_tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization task */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of the comment (e.g., note, issue, resolution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES optimization_tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization task */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., log, report, data) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_files_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES optimization_tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "role_department" TEXT /* Department associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access was granted */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the access */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access (e.g., 1 hour, 1 day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., error, info, warning) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the log was generated */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log (e.g., node, application, user) */,
  "log_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the log (e.g., info, warning, error, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
